string 2:
Blimpmon came back from the Cosmic Area, but Coronamon
didn't.

This isn't working for me. I have to take some kind of
action!
{next}Are you worried?
{next}Why isn't it working for you?
{next}Why not just ignore it?

Hmm... Well, yeah, I am, but that's not all. It's hard to
describe what I'm feeling.

It's hard to describe, but... I'm not sure it's right for me
to just sit here waiting.

I wish I could, but... I know I can't stop myself from
feeling restless.

I think... I need to go, too. To the Cosmic Area, I mean. I
don't want to just sit here.

Coronamon went to Heat Cosmic, didn't he? But I'd rather not
go to the exact same place...

There's a place called Chill Cosmic, too, right? How about
we go there instead?

I don't have the proper equipment to go to Chill Cosmic.
It's tough without a heater.

It'd sure be nice if there was one around somewhere. I dunno
where to look, though.
What can you do to counter the cold?

That'd take a heater. It sure would be nice if there was one
around somewhere...
{next}I'll go get one.
What's a heater?
I think we'd better give up.

Listen to ya! "I'll go get one." You're just the coolest kid
ever, you know that?

All right, I'll be waiting. I got no doubt in my mind ya'll
live up to yer word!

You humans use them, too, right? They're the same thing.
They warm up cold spaces.

Whoa, slow down, there! Let's at least give it a little more
thought!

I'll look, too, of course. A heater... Hmm. Somehow, that
rings a bell.

I feel like I've seen one in a house here in town. I can't
remember which one, though...

Bring any type of heater you find, and Datamon'll decide if
it can be used or not.

Okay, then, let's get to work! We need to find someone in
town who has a heater.
Hmm. I don't think this is the spot.
I'm going to try somewhere else. You keep it up, too.
Darn. This house doesn't seem to have a heater.
I'm not giving up, though. On to the next location.

Is there a heater here...? Doesn't look like it. Another
failure.

There are still places to check. Just have to stay positive
and keep moving!

Doesn't look like there's a heater here. But I'm certain I
saw one in a house somewhere...

Well, there's no point in hanging around here. I'm going to
search somewhere else.

Welcome. It's cold, but feel free to take a load off...
*shivering*
I lost my heater, you see. Someone stole it.
{next}That's awful!
{next}Who stole it?
{next}Is it really that cold?

Yeah, it IS awful. Really rough for someone sensitive to the
cold like me.

A Goblimon. Probably still skulking around nearby. I just
know he took it as a prank!

I dunno, it feels like I'm freezing from the inside out.
Must be some sort of sensitivity.

The thief who made off with my heater might still be
somewhere in Central Town.

If you find him, punish him for me! I'll bet he's somewhere
in a group of Goblimon.
{next}So you don't know exactly who took it?
{next}Who's the culprit, exactly?
{next}I'll just lay out every thief I find, then.
Nope. The thief was alone, but I couldn't tell who it was.

I can't tell thieves apart. All I know... is that one of 'em
did it.

You sure know how to make things easy. That's exactly what I
was going to suggest!

Since I can't tell which of the lowlifes did it, our only
option is to shake 'em all down.

The culprit should have the heater on them... Huh? What
should you do if you get it back?

Well, that heater was on the fritz. I'm going to buy a new one.
If you want it, it's yours.
Hey! Look who it is! Where are we off to today?
{next}I brought you a heater.
{end}I'll be back later.

Look at that! A heater! You actually found one. That's
amazing!

*sigh* I couldn't find a heater... Not even after all that
searching.
That's okay. I've got a heater right here!
What? You found one? Nice work!
Oh, wait... Isn't this heater broken?

Lessee... Okay. This much, we can probably fix. I think
it'll be usable!
I'll ask about the repairs. Just hang tight!

The heater has been installed! And repaired, of course, so
it'll work.
Yay...! Now you can go to the Cosmic Area.
I need to go there. I have to go after Coronamon.

Gotcha. Okay, one more trip to the Cosmic Area, coming right
up!

Here's a token of my gratitude. It's the best I can do for
now, so please take it.
Well, I'm on my way. Thanks for everything!
Off we go!
Take me to the Cosmic Area.
{end}I'll be back later.
Hmm. Sorry, but I can't go there right now.

After actually going there, I realized that place is way
crazier than I'd imagined.

I'd prefer to steer clear until I'm a little more robust.
Sorry I can't give ya a lift...

Who do ya think ya are, huh?! Yer startin' to annoy me! Beat
it!
{next}Did you steal a heater?
{end}Goodbye.

I dunno nothin' about no heater! Give me any more lip and
ya'll regret it!
I... I'm sorry... I had no idea you were so strong...
I'll leave ya be, so just lemme go, okay?! S-See ya later!
Gyahaha! I've got me somethin' special here!

I just got my hands on the latest-model club! I dunno 'bout
no heater!
Huh? Ya tryin' to start a fight with me or somethin'?

Oi! What business do you have with my best friend's little
brother?

Oh, it's you, Wendi! My big brother's best friend! This
person won't leave me alone...

What?! I don't take kindly to people who mess with my
friends! You'll pay for this!
Wh-Who is this person?! I've never seen anyone so strong...!

Wendi, my big brother's all-powerful best friend, just got
beat bad! H-Help meee!
Oh! Nice weather today, huh...?
Wh-What?! How did ya know that?!
Well, the cat's outta the bag now! Get 'em, everybody!

U-Ungh...! I was just stealin' to try and make a li'l
money...
